update.releaseNotes:
v5.4.8 - Changelog
Adjustments --- - Rename `Enable Popup Check` setting to `Stop on Unexpected Popups` for clarity. - Skip redundant training screen exit/re-entry for `Irregular Training`. - Reduce effective stat cap by expected finale race gains to avoid wasting free stats. - Skip training analysis when energy is depleted and no charm is available. - Skip entering training screen for `Irregular Training` evaluation at zero energy without charm.
